title: Attempted to access private field
explanation: This error occurs when you try to access a struct field that is private. In Rust, struct fields are private by default and can only be accessed from within the same module unless marked as pub.
error_message: error[E0616]: field `radius` of struct `Circle` is private
tip: Prefer getter methods over public fields for better encapsulation. This lets you change the internal representation without breaking external code.
